name: Food Service Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch 5/27/96
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Beat together sugar and brown sugar until fluffy. Slowly beat in eggs and vanilla. Sift flour and baking soda separately and mix into the dough. Mix in pecans and chocolate until just combined. Scoop out about 3 tablespoons of cookie dough and form into a ball (or use an ice cream scooper). Place on a cookie sheet and press down slightly. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes.
